issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack), not 'OnAttacked' (when your character is attacked). The card activates when opponent attacks, not when you are attacked.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' frequency constraint. DSL should include frequency limiting this ability to once per turn.
Missing cost requirement: ability costs 1 DON!! (➀). Action should include GiveDon/AttachDon cost deduction or cost field specification.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] ➀: Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less.
